LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO APRIL-30-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JASMINE PAYNE, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT HAS A PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED FOR THE APRIL 16 HEARING AND WILL ENDORSE THAT PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING FINAL APPROVAL BUT REQUIRES THE PARTIES TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FINAL JUDGMENT. THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIANCE HEARING WILL BE SET FOR JANUARY 14, 2026 AT 9:00 A.M. ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA) *** COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF INDICATED TO THE CLERK THAT THE JUDGMENT WILL BE SUBMITTED AFTER THE COMPLIANCE HEARING. ***

Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JASMINE PAYNE, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement is granted. The court has a proposed order submitted for the April 16 hearing and will endorse that proposed order granting final approval but requires the parties to submit a proposed final judgment. The settlement compliance hearing will be set for January 14, 2026 at 9:00 a.m.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

*** Counsel for the plaintiff indicated to the clerk that the judgment will be submitted after the compliance hearing. ***

PLACEHOLDER - FINAL APPROVAL HEARING (PER DEC-13-2024 ORDER)
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Off Calendar

Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Continued To Apr-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JASMINE PAYNE, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court continues the matter on its own motion to April 30, 2025. The motion for final approval makes reference to a Declaration of Plaintiff Jasmine Payne in Support of Plaintiff's Motion for Final Approval of Class Action and PAGA Settlement. (See brief at 13:14-15.) No such declaration was filed. The court requires this to evaluate the representative payment; the Payne declaration in support of the motion for preliminary approval does not address the time, effort, and hardship incurred by Plaintiff in bringing this case. The court is otherwise prepared to grant final approval. Plaintiff shall file the missing declaration no later than three court days in advance of the continued hearing.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2025 Continued To May-28-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-13-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JASMINE PAYNE'S Motion for Preliminary Approval of Class Action and PAGA Settlement.

Plaintiff Jasmine Payne's motion, which is unopposed, is GRANTED; good cause appearing, the court: (1) grants preliminary approval of the proposed Class Action and PAGA Settlement Agreement ("Settlement"); (2) conditionally certifies the proposed Class for settlement purposes only; (3) appoints Plaintiff as the Class Representative; (4) appoints Wilshire Law Firm, PLC as Class Counsel; (5) appoints Phoenix Settlement Administrators, Inc. as the Settlement Administrator; and (6) setting a final approval hearing date.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
